deferred_subitems.title: CircularCoil JAX port (uses complete elliptic integrals)
deferred_subitems.detail: jax.scipy.special.ellipk and ellipe are not available in jaxlib 0.10.0. CircularCoil JAX port requires either a custom JAX-native Carlson R_F / R_D or Bulirsch cel implementation in simsopt/jax_core/ first. Recorded as a follow-up sub-item.

evidence.adapter_module: N/A: downstream wrappers (InterpolatedField, tracing classifier, surface distance interpolant) are owned by items 15 and 16 and continue to use the C++ binding
evidence.serialization_restart_check: N/A: RegularGridInterpolant3DSpec is runtime-only state; mesh and per-cell table are built at construction and never serialised
evidence.transfer_guard_test: N/A: kernel build is pure NumPy; compiled evaluator stages explicit jnp.asarray boundary at evaluate_batch entry; no Optimizable wrapper boundary introduced
evidence.multi_device_test: N/A: per-sample kernel; no shard_map / psum / all_reduce / pjit introductions

blocker.detail: Item 14 requires (a) item 13 closure for RegularGridInterpolant3D-backed LevelsetStoppingCriterion, (b) a JAX Boozer field port (P5 items 32-33, currently future-scope), (c) a JAX surface classifier kernel, and (d) a tolerance-policy decision on event-time accuracy for the bisection root solver. None of these are resolvable inside the active-scope budget without expanding active_scope and adding a tolerance lane.

evidence.source_audit: src/simsoptpp/tracing.cpp:25-554 (6 RHS classes, RK45 DOPRI5 + TOMS748 + 9 stopping criteria); src/simsoptpp/tracing.h:1-158
downstream_consumers: src/simsopt/field/tracing.py (936 LOC; 8 sopp.* call sites + 9 StoppingCriterion subclasses)
missing_dependencies: JAX Boozer field port (P5 items 32-33; future-scope)
JAX surface classifier kernel for LevelsetStoppingCriterion
tolerance lane for event-time accuracy in PARITY_LADDER_TOLERANCES (tolerance_policy)

blocker.detail: Partial wrappers exist for ToroidalField, PoloidalField, MirrorModel, Dommaschk, and Reiman. Item 15 remains blocked because the prompt scope also includes CircularCoil, which has no JAX-native complete-elliptic-integral kernel under jaxlib 0.10.0, and InterpolatedField, whose cylindrical/folding public-wrapper semantics are not closed by the item-13 rectangular interpolant kernel.

Item 16 depends on item 14 (tracing RK path), which is BLOCKED with the same category. No JAX backend for trace_particles/fieldline_tracing exists, so the wrapper cannot route to a JAX path without violating anti-pattern invariants (no silent fallback, no broad except).

evidence.source_audit: src/simsopt/field/tracing.py (936 LOC; 8 sopp.* call sites + 9 StoppingCriterion subclasses)

validation.command: JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu JAX_ENABLE_X64=1 .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_jax_import_smoke.py -k "collective or sharding or subprocess" -v

JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/geo/test_distance_jax.py tests/geo/test_curve_objectives.py -k 'distance_jax or pairwise_penalty_chunking_matches_dense_paths or curve_surface_chunked_gradient_respects_strict_transfer_guard or curve_surface_dense_path_respects_strict_transfer_guard or curve_surface_chunked_path_does_not_materialize_dense_matrix or pairwise_penalty_chunking_preserves_infeasible_barrier_inf or pairwise_penalty_chunking_preserves_finite_zero_penalty_gradients or pairwise_penalty_accepts_explicit_row_sharding or pairwise_penalty_chunking_is_strict_transfer_safe'

JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_jax_import_smoke.py -k 'pairwise_penalty_accepts_explicit_row_sharding or pairwise_curve_penalty_pure_functions or legacy_curve_objective_values or legacy_curve_objective_gradients'

.conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m ruff check src/simsopt/field/coilobjective.py tests/field/test_coilobjective.py && .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m ruff format --check src/simsopt/field/coilobjective.py tests/field/test_coilobjective.py

JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/field/test_selffieldforces.py -k 'regularization_functions_transform_under_strict_transfer_guard or b_regularized_pure_jit_vmap_strict_transfer_guard_matches_wrapper or regularized_coil_self_field_methods_use_strict_transfer_boundary'
JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/field/test_selffieldforces.py -k 'regularization_circ or regularization_rect or circular_coil'
.conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m ruff check src/simsopt/field/coil.py tests/field/test_selffieldforces.py && .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m ruff format --check src/simsopt/field/coil.py
